mapper.select: SELECT f.code as code, f.relative_path as relativePath, f.size as size, COALESCE(f.update_time, f.create_time) as updateTime FROM file f WHERE f.del_flag = 0 AND f.sync_directory_id = #{syncDirectoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND f.relative_path IS NOT NULL AND f.relative_path != ''
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CAST(f.size AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM file f WHERE f.create_by = #{userId} AND f.del_flag = 0 AND f.sync_directory_id IS NOT NULL
